name: Curry Powder #3
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine all the ingredients.
2. Spread the mixture out on a jelly roll pan and toast in a preheated oven at 250 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
3. Let cool to room temperature.
4. Pulverize the spice mixture in batches using an electric spice or coffee grinder.
5. Strain it through a sieve into a bowl.
6. The curry powder will keep six months in a tightly sealed jar in a cool, dark place.
7. Use to season soups and stews. Makes about 1/2 cup.
